name: mend-blz
description: End-to-end Mend remediation recipe for Blazemeter — composes the mend, dep-remediation, jenkins, github, and jira skills into one loop: alerts → fix on a dated branch → Jenkins green → Confluence report → Jira (MOB, created first) → PR (ticket id in the title from creation) → Jira description updated with the PR link. Holds the fix-loop order/gates and supplies the ticket summary/name to jira; the reusable knowledge lives in the composed skills and the component registry lives in the orchestrator (config/services.json).
